title: Farmer's Cutting: Promenade
description: Adds Farmer's Delight (Refabricated) cutting recipes for Promenade
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cutting board recipes for [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- Blueberries can be cut into more dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eAGs83gV/images/b56e713ee8020af872e14ed3eef8b4c4092bc093.png) ![Blueberries Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eAGs83gV/images/656916e429e7a38f0393d7e3eb373f0420156ed9.png)
